paragraphs.text: After this Jacob came and settled in Shechem. “And Shechem the son of Hamor… saw Dinah, the daughter of Jacob, and took her… and defiled her” (Gen 34:2). When the Shechemites began to ask the sons of Jacob to give Dinah in marriage to Shechem, the sons of Jacob spoke with guile (Gen 34:13) to the Shechemites, saying that if they received circumcision, they would give them Dinah, but did not inform their father of this. And on the day when the Shechemites “were in pain” (Gen 34:25), they slew with the sword all the men of Shechem, took the women captive, and plundered their possessions.
